name: CRM Server
description: Exposes local database models mapping leads status and whatsapp communication tables.

name: Google Drive Server
description: Interacts with GDrive APIs to scan and search directories documentation archives.

name: GitHub Server
description: Queries repositories branches, issues, files structures and pull requests.

name: Slack Server
description: Dispatches channel message alerts and posts status summaries notifications.

name: Notion Server
description: Fetches SOP workspaces, meeting notes pages and training manuals documents.
